title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 59.130
text:
59.130.  Seal. — Every recorder of deeds shall have a seal of office, and shall have power to take the acknowledgment of proof of deeds and instruments of writing.
(RSMo 1939 § 13180, A.L. 2001 S.B. 288) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11561; 1919 § 10584; 1909 § 10397 
Effective 7-01-01
